user_message:
Create an ad for:
Brand: Aesop
Product type: Resurrection hand wash
Tone: refined, natural, minimalist
Visual style: Clean, muted earth tones with simple, elegant packaging emphasizing natural ingredients and understated luxury.
Conceptual technique: sensory experience storytelling
Format: image

brief.headline: Hands Down, The Best Part of Your Day
brief.caption: A serene bathroom scene features a sunlit wooden countertop with a minimalist ceramic sink. Aesop's Resurrection hand wash bottle stands elegantly beside a sprig of fresh rosemary and a lemon, casting gentle shadows on the textured stone surface.
brief.visual_style: Clean, muted earth tones with simple, elegant packaging emphasizing natural ingredients and understated luxury.
brief.typography_style: Elegant serif with high contrast, understated yet distinctive
brief.color_scheme: soft sage green, creamy white, and muted charcoal
